description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a light-colored exterior, featuring a spacious open-plan interior visible through large windows. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars, a lush green lawn, and several mature trees providing shade. A covered outdoor seating area with a canopy and a children's playset are situated in the backyard, while a rectangular swimming pool is positioned adjacent to the house. The roof is flat and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The landscaping is well-maintained, with stone pathways and garden beds enhancing the curb appeal. The overall design is modern and functional, ideal for suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, pool, and landscaped yard featuring trees and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, and a clear view of the open-plan interior and backyard amenities.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, cars, large tree, and partial view of the backyard with canopy and playset.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, backyard canopy, playset, and the swimming pool adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, backyard canopy, and the open lawn area with visible interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
